news.t: Clean energy will win out 'over decades, not days,' ETF manager says as trade loses steam
ESG investing to reach $1 trillion by 2030, says head of iShares Americas as carbon transition funds launch
BlackRock Has Launched Two Gigantic Sustainable ETFs. What to Know.

holdings.infoBox: LCTU is an equity ETF with a total of 324 individual holdings. The top holdings are NVIDIA stock at 7.57%, Apple at 6.98%, Microsoft at 3.54%, Alphabet at 2.91%, and Amazon.com at 2.88%.

overview.description: The iShares U.S. Carbon Transition Readiness Aware Active ETF (LCTU) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in stocks based on a particular theme. The fund is an actively-managed portfolio of large- and mid-cap US firms in the Russell 1000 Index that are selected and weighted with a preference for lower carbon emissions. LCTU was launched on Apr 6, 2021 and is issued by BlackRock.

data.title: Clean energy will win out 'over decades, not days,' ETF manager says as trade loses steam
data.text: The transition to clean energy is a long-term theme, a top Invesco ETF strategist says after a hot 2020 for the trade.

data.title: ESG investing to reach $1 trillion by 2030, says head of iShares Americas as carbon transition funds launch
data.text: As money pours into environmental, social and governance (ESG) investments, BlackRock's head of iShares Americas says this is just the beginning.

data.text: CNBC's Bob Pisani breaks down sustainable ETFs and the ESG investing with Armando Senra of BlackRock iShares.
